snippet: Each year, the department releases Year 6 to 7 placement information for schools and parents and carers, including: All Victorian government primary and secondary schools must follow the processes set out in the statewide placement timeline and information packs for 2026 to 2027. When placing students in Year 7, schools must not: The Statewide placement timeline for 2026 to 2027 (DOCX) (staff login required) External Link for Victorian government schools has been developed to assist all government primary and secondary schools with the placement of students in Year 7. This timeline includes activity descriptions and an overview of responsibilities to assist school staff with key dates:
